text:
But, Venus, seated in Aquarius is out to
do mischieflo his enemy, by his aspect on Leo. Thus Jupiter fmds himself in
a predicament. But, in Sagittarius, Jupiter has his friend Mars, Ketu and Mer
cury. Three houses Virgo, Libra and Scorpio have to be passed for Jupiter to
find help. That comes to 3 X 12 = 36 years. So, the native will pass through a
dangerous period during his 36th year of age. After he survives this, he will
enjoy good fortune.
Disciple: As Jupiter and Mercury have exchanged houses, it is tenta
mount to Jupiter being stationed in Sagittarius and Mercury in Virgo. Will
there be no beneficial effects emanating from Mars, Ketu and the Sun in the
adjacent house?
Preceptor:' It is because of the exchange of houses between Jupiter and
Mercury that the native has the prospect of marrying and getting children.
Had the exchange of houses not been there, the native would have died quite
early.
Rahu and Ketu have obstructed all good fortune, Saturn has no planet in
